# rclone exclude rules for GitHub → Google Drive sync
# Format: one pattern per line, all are excludes.
# Docs: https://rclone.org/filtering/

# ── Git internals ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Git object store, refs, hooks — never belongs in Drive.
.git/**
.gitignore
.gitkeep

# ── GitHub CI/CD ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Workflows, this exclude file itself, setup docs — infra, not content.
.github/**

# ── Git hooks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# pre-commit script (check-version.ps1 runner) — dev tooling only.
.githooks/**

# ── AI assistant configuration ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# .claude/ — Claude Code settings; .codex/ — OpenAI Codex settings.
# AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md — project-level AI instructions, not content rules.
.claude/**
.codex/**
AGENTS.md
CLAUDE.md

# ── Development / build scripts ───────────────────────────────────────────────
# bump-version.ps1, check-version.ps1 — version management tooling.
scripts/**

# ── Version tracking ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# VERSION file is a technical artifact used by the pre-commit hook.
VERSION

# ── OS / editor artifacts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Produced locally; should never reach the repo, but exclude defensively.
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
.idea/**
.vscode/**
*.tmp
*.bak
